Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Robert Perkiss, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Discovery Mining, Inc.

No other appearance. Tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Discovery Mining's motion for assignment of rights, restraining and turnover order is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Abitration Award Fand Enter Judgment Therein, Fand For Reasonable Attorney Fees,
Off Calendar Jun-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
